word: G2606 - καταγελάω - katageláō - kat-ag-el-ah'-o - Laugh to scorn

sections.paragraph:
- Original: καταγελάω

- Transliteration: Katagelao

- Phonetic: kat-ag-el-ah'-o

- Definition:

1. to deride

- Origin: a primitive root

- TDNT entry: 11:58,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: To laugh down that is deride: - laugh to scorn.
